source_pr.title: executor: accelerate TestVectorizedMergeJoin and TestVectorizedShuffleMergeJoin
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: #24130 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

1. reusing test case table.
2. deleting reduplicate test cases. 

Before:
```
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f  TestVectorizedMergeJoin
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        7.467s
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f TestVectorizedShuffleMergeJoin
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        6.438s
```

After
```
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f TestVectorizedMergeJoin
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        5.347s
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f TestVectorizedShuffleMergeJoin
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        4.998s
```

### Related changes



### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
